Ingame Description: Target takes a small amount of damage. Then, it takees damage equal to the potency of its Bomb and this debuff is removed.
Target is afflicted with Poisoned and Burning.
Enemies take a moderate amount of damage and lose a large amount of Defense.
Caster Attacks random enemies 3 times. Each attack deals 15% normal damage.
Enemies are afflicted with a random debuff.
Caster Attacks the target once for each turn the caster has taken in the current battle. Maximum of 10 attacks.
Target creature's Attack is set equal to its Intelligence.
All creatures take a massive amount of damage.
Enemies' buffs are removed, and your creatures gain those buffs.
One of the five Nether Orbs (chosen randomly) is awakened to cast a powerful spell. This spell is an Ultimate Spell.
Deals a massive amount of damage to the target, then bounces to each of the target's allies at random. The damage is reduced by 20% for each bounce. This spell is a Booze Spell.
Enemies take a large amount of damage. This spell always deals critical damage.
Enemies take a moderate amount of damage, plus 1% more damage for every 1% Health each enemy is missing.
Target takes a large amount of damage and is afflicted with Scorned.
Enemies take a small amount of damage, or a massive amount if they are afflicted with Burning.

Enemies take a moderate amount of damage and have a 10% chance to be afflicted with Silenced, Burning, and Feared. This spell cannot be cast manually, but has a 30% chance to cast at the start of the caster's turn.
Enemies take a small amount of damage, plus 20% more damage for each time enemies have Cast a spell in the current battle.
Target takes a large amount of damage and the caster recovers a large amount of Health.
Target takes a devastating amount of damage. In addition, your creatures gain Attack, Intelligence, Defense and Speed equal to 30% of the damage dealt. This spell is an Ultimate spell.
Target recovers a small amount of Health, or a massive amount of Health if the target is afflicted with Burning.
Target takes a large amount of damage continuously and is afflicted with Bleeding and Vulnerable. After the target takes damage, this spell has a 35% chance to end.
Target takes a small amount of damage, plus 5% more damage for each time your creatures have Attacked in the current battle.
Target takes a moderate amount of damage that ignores 50% of its Defense.
Target is afflicted with 3 random debuffs.
Your creatures gain a moderate amount of Attack and Savage.
Enemies' classes are changed to match that of the target for the rest of the battle.
Enemies take a large amount of damage and their buffs and minions are removed.
Caster Casts one of the target's Spell Gems.
Your creatures gain a random trait.
Target's spell gems are Sealed for the rest of the battle.
Target gains Maximum Health equal to its Current Health.
Enemies take a small amount of damage plus 10% for how low they are on the Timeline.

Random enemies take damage equal to 100% of their Bomb's potency. If they do not already have this debuff, they are afflicted with it. After each enemy is affected by this spell, it has a 25% chance to end.
Target takes a devastating amount of damage, plus 50% more damage for each Chaos Infusion you have.
Target takes a small amount of damage, and all enemies take damage equal to 35% of the damage the target's Burning debuff would deal over its remaining duration.
Potency of the target's Bomb is increased by 80% of the caster's Speed.
Target takes a large amount of damage, plus 5% more damage for each time the caster has Cast a spell in the current battle.
Target takes a large amount of damage and loses a large amount of Defense.
Target has a 50% chance to be killed. Otherwise, the caster is killed.
Casts a random spell that belongs to the Cataclysm race. This effect has a 50% chance to repeat indefinitely.
Enemies take a small amount of damage for each debuff (up to 3) they have.
Your creatures gain a large amount of Attack and Intelligence, and a random Chaos Spell Gem.
Enemies lose a large amount of a random stat, and your creatures gain a large amount of that stat.
Enemies take a moderate amount of damage and have a 75% chance to be afflicted with Blighted, a 50% chance to be afflicted with Inverted, and a 25% chance to be afflicted with Cursed.
Target takes a moderate amount of damage, plus 50% more damage for each enemy of the same class fighting on the target's side.
Target takes a massive amount of damage, minus 30% damage for each turn the caster has taken in the current battle.
Target gains a Barrier that absorbs damage equal to its Defense, and loses 50% Defense.

Target takes a massive amount of damage and has a 50% chance to be sent to the bottom of the timeline. 50% of the damage is based on the caster's Attack and 50% of the damage is based on the caster's Speed instead of Intelligence.
Increases the duration of enemies' Burning and Poisoned debuffs by 3 turns and increases their potency by 50%.
Potencies of enemies' Bomb, Poisoned and Burning debuffs are averaged.
Target takes a small amount of damage twice. 100% of the damage dealt is based on the caster's Attack instead of Intelligence.
Target and the creatures adjacent to it take a moderate amount of damage.

Target takes a large amount of damage, and all other enemies take 30% of this damage.
All creatures' end-of-turn effects are activated and the Timeline is shuffled. This spell cannot be Cast manually, and has a 5% chance to be Cast at the start of each creature's turn.
Your creatures gain a random trait and are afflicted with Disarmed.

Target takes a moderate amount of damage, plus 15% more damage for each debuff the caster has.

Enemies take a large amount of damage and are afflicted with Bomb. For each enemy that already has Bomb, this spell deals 20% more damage.

Potency of enemies' Bomb debuffs is increased by 30% of the caster's Speed.

Enemies take a moderate amount of damage. 50% of the damage is based on the caster's Attack instead of Intelligence.
Target gains Arcane and Warded.
Enemies' Ethereal Spell Gems are sealed.
All creatures are afflicted with Silenced.
Target takes a moderate amount of damage. 50% of the damage is based on the caster's Attack instead of Intelligence.
Your creatures gain Warded.
Target has a 35% chance to be killed. If this happens, all other enemies take a massive amount of damage.
Enemies take a massive amount of damage.
Target is sent to the bottom of the Timeline.
Target Attacks itself. Then, it has a 30% chance to attack itself again. This effect can occur multiple times in a row.
Target is afflicted with Silenced and Stone.
Caster gains Animated Gem.
Caster gains Animated Weapon.
Caster gains 1 stack of Dire Wolves.
Caster gains Doppelganger.
Target is afflicted with Confused and Cursed.
Proceed to the next creature's turn on the Timeline, ignoring all subsequent effects as a result of casting this spell.
Target executes its start-of-turn effects and increases the number of turns it has taken by 1. This spell can only ever target 1 creature and can only be Cast once at a time.
Target gains this creature's Artifact's Trait.

Caster's buffs are removed and this Spell Gem's owner steals 5% of the caster's highest stat. This spell cannot be cast manually, but has a 20% chance to be cast by enemies at the start of their turns.
Enemies take a moderate amount of damage, plus 5% more damage for each Charge each of its other Spell Gems are missing.
Enemies are no longer Invisible.
Enemies each take a massive amount of damage continuously. After they take damage, this effect has a 50% chance to end, and then it jumps to the next enemy.
The number of turns all creatures have taken in the current battle is set to 0.
Enemies take a small amount of damage multiplied by the number of times your creatures have Cast a spell in the current battle. This spell is an Ultimate Spell.
Your creatures' Current Health is set equal to that of the target.
Caster gains a small amount of Attack for each turn it has taken in the current battle (up to 5 times).
Your creatures gain their lowest stat equal to 100% of the target's Poisoned potency.
Caster gains the target's trait.
The caster Casts 3 of the target's Spell Gems in your favor.
Target is afflicted with Confused.
If the target has been resurrected in the current battle, it is killed.
Enemies with Cursed Cast one of their single-target damage spells on a random creature.
Caster swaps positions with the target on the Timeline.
